image_specs.format: JPEG (preferred) or PNG with transparent edges
image_specs.naming: Use the `filename` field. Each tool → ONE image.

style_direction.vibe: Dark, premium, editorial — match the Remake Pixel identity
style_direction.feel: Cinematic close-up product shots that hint at what the tool does
style_direction.avoid: Generic stock photos · Pollo.ai duplicates · text overlays · busy backgrounds

tools.description: Multi-modal AI generation hub — text-to-image + photo-to-image + style presets
tools.visual_brief: Cinematic portrait of a young person mid-transformation, half realistic / half stylized neon-edged version. Hint of magic / sparks. Purple ambient light.

tools.description: Outfit swap on any person photo using reference clothing or text
tools.visual_brief: Close-up of a person turning, outfit changing mid-spin (motion blur). Wardrobe-rack silhouette in background. Editorial fashion mood.

tools.description: 33 artistic style transformations — anime, oil paint, watercolor, comic, cyberpunk, etc.
tools.visual_brief: A single face split into 4 artistic styles vertically: anime · oil paint · watercolor · cyberpunk. Frame-collage edits, brush strokes visible.

tools.description: 20 cinematic realism + mood presets. Editorial enhancement.
tools.visual_brief: Hyper-detailed magazine-cover portrait, soft beauty light, golden-hour skin tones. Camera lens flare in corner. Vogue cover energy.

tools.description: Clean background removal — transparent cutouts for logos, products, faces
tools.visual_brief: A person/object floating in checkered transparency pattern, sharp edge highlighted. Half background dissolving into pixels.

tools.description: 2× or 4× upscaling with detail recovery from blurry photos
tools.visual_brief: Side-by-side: blurry pixelated half ↔ ultra-sharp half, with a vertical zoom-arrow seam in the middle. Tech grid overlay.

tools.description: Old / damaged photos → crisp restored versions. Reduces noise, enhances faces.
tools.visual_brief: Aged sepia photo with scratches transforming into a vibrant restored portrait. Dust particles, vintage paper texture.
Vintage B&W photo of a couple, colors pouring in like watercolor from one corner. Warm skin tones bleeding into the grayscale.

tools.description: Paint a zone, describe replacement. Remove people, text, objects from photos.
tools.visual_brief: A photo with a magenta mask highlighting an area where a tourist used to be, now empty beach. Subtle 'before/after' overlay.

tools.description: 20 templates — flyers, editorial, epic, sci-fi, hero, music phone — accepts user photo
tools.visual_brief: Stack of 3 high-end magazine/poster mockups fanned out: bold typography, dramatic portraits. Editorial flatlay vibe.

tools.description: Multi-slide Instagram carousels with consistent visual style
tools.visual_brief: Phone mockup showing 3 Instagram slides side-by-side with cohesive purple-toned visuals. Swipe indicator. Soft hand holding the device.

tools.description: Interactive 5-question wizard that builds a perfect prompt for users
tools.visual_brief: Floating Q&A bubbles arranged in a conversation flow, with a glowing crystal-ball-like AI orb. Lightbulb iconography. Friendly chat vibe.

tools.description: Cinematic 6-second AI video clips from text or photo input
tools.visual_brief: Film strip with frames of a portrait coming to life, cinematic 21:9 letterbox, neon timeline scrubber. Hollywood preview vibe.
